title: Beer potion (get drunk)
description: This potion lets you get "drunk" in minecraft! Custom recipe, custom screen shaking, etc. Just try it out!
body:
### ✨ Features:
- Added Drunk status effect with wobbly movement
- Visual cloud particles around affected players
- Sound effects (drinking sounds, burping, villager noises)
- Brewing recipes using fermented spider eye
- Customizable with redstone (longer) and glowstone (stronger)
- Milk bucket antidote recipe

### 🧪 How to use:
1. Brew: Awkward Potion + Fermented Spider Eye
2. Drink to get wobbly drunk movement
3. Use milk bucket to create antidote
